channel.title: Bank on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Bank on Gajab Jobs

item.title: Indian Bank Specialist Officer Vacancy 2026
item.description: Indian Bank has released the Specialist Officer (SO) Recruitment 2026 notification for multiple posts across IT, Finance, Credit, HR, and other departments. Candidates with relevant qualifications and experience can apply online from 08 April to 28 April 2026. The selection process may include an online test and interview. Applicants are advised to check the detailed eligibility criteria and apply before the last date.

item.title: Punjab & Sind Bank LOB Online Form 2026
item.description: Punjab & Sind Bank invites applications for 1000 Local Bank Officer (JMGS-I) posts. Eligible graduates with banking experience can apply from 31 March to 20 April 2026. Selection includes online test, interview and language test.

item.title: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer SO Online Form 2026
item.description: IDBI Bank has released the official notification for Specialist Officer (SO) Recruitment 2026-27. A total of 33 vacancies are available for posts in IT, Risk Management, Audit, and Security Officer. The online application process started on 25 March 2026 and will close on 08 April 2026. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website and check complete details including eligibility, age limit, salary, and selection process.

item.title: BOB Professional WMS Online Form 2026
item.description: Bank of Baroda has announced WMS Recruitment 2026 for 104 posts in the Wealth Management Services department. Candidates with graduation and relevant experience can apply online from 27 March 2026 to 16 April 2026. The selection process may include an online test and interview.

item.title: UP Co-operative Bank Various Posts Online Form 2026
item.description: UP Cooperative Bank Recruitment 2026 has been announced by the Uttar Pradesh Cooperative Institutional Service Board (UPCISB) for 116 vacancies including Manager, Junior Manager, Assistant/Cashier, Assistant Typist and Assistant Engineer posts. The online application process starts on 25 March 2026 and ends on 15 April 2026. This recruitment is specially for SC and OBC candidates of Uttar Pradesh. Interested candidates can apply online by visiting the official website. The selection process will be based on an online examination followed by interview or skill test as per the post requirements.
